pages.title: Introduction
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)

Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School aims at providing an excellent education to empower each student to have a true sense of self-respect which will enable her to build her identity, to find her purpose in life and to be of value to society. The School embraces the challenge of nurturing individual talents and strengths into valued accomplishments by providing an outstanding education that develops character, academic excellence, leadership, social responsibility and physical wellness.

It is our endeavour to educate girls from classes L.K.G. to XII, with the CBSE curriculum, in a caring atmosphere. The management of the school has ensured that no stone is left unturned to provide the students "a home away from home". The campus caters for comfortable hostels for a stay, an infirmary to look after minor ailments and a modern kitchen and mess which provide healthy, homely and wholesome meals to the students.

At Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School you will find an ethos of tradition, truth, responsibility and respect; a curriculum that meets the challenges of a global society; beautiful infrastructure and facilities for learning; special care and personal attention for every child; an educational community committed to ensuring that every child is happy and successful.

To provide healthy learning environment and quality education. Further encouraging development, both academically and socially. To nurture girl children, to help them grow fully to their potential and become what a human being can become. We pledge ourselves to do our best to facilitate full development of every girl child.

We hope to create a happy school environment in which every child grows as one who can seize every opportunity, each child will feel that she has a place and develop a willingness to learn; becomes caring and humane; is enlightened about the culture and civilization; can distinguish right and wrong on her own; is unafraid to stand up to the unjust and unfair; and is willing to serve humanity, and feel one with the whole world. To achieve this we pledge to;
Create and maintain a psycho-social environment which is positive and encouraging;

pages.title: Resources
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)

A team of well-qualified, experienced, young and vibrant staff aims to strengthen students' skills and cultivate their talents to meet the need of changing education trends. They emphasize on moulding students into intellectually brilliant, ethically sound, emotionally mature and physically fit individuals.

Aesthetically planned Junior Wing of LPS is painted with vibrant hues and shapes, well-equipped with state of the art facilities such as toys, puzzles, books and other teaching aids., supplement with a toy room having beautifully arranged swings, slides and play items and an audio visual room to satisfy the children's creative needs and challenge their analytical ability, making them even more inquisitive.
Digital classrooms with Modern IFP (Interactive Flat Panel)
The smart classrooms are equipped with digitized syllabus contents which are projectable. And even the school is using IFP’s to promote audio- visual aid for the better learning of the students.
The school has a fully loaded computer lab with internet facility. Our students are initiated into computers at an early age to keep in touch with the outer world and enjoy practical sessions.
An integrated science lab with all essential equipments, instruments, specimen, models, charts, etc. is accessible to children.

pages.title: Rules and Regulations
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)
Any concern regarding your child should be given in writing to the school Principal along with proper details of the students.
For enquiry, adhere to our office time on week days between 11:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
You can meet the school Principal on week days between 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM only.
To avoid inconvenience, change in address or phone no. should be registered with the school office at the earliest.
In an academic year 75% student attendance is compulsary.
Students can remain absent only with sanctioned leave.

Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)

Marudher Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi represents a cross section of the society and is a rich blanket of multi cultural diversities. Girls join here from varied cultural, social, racial and religious backgrounds. Within campus they learn to live together as a family , regardless for their roots to create newer and stronger bonds with each other that will last in them a life time experience.
Since our humble beginnings in 1956, MARUDHAR MAHILA SHIKSHAN SANGH, VIDYAWADI has stood as a beacon of hope, progress, and empowerment for girls across the nation.
Our journey has been driven by a singular belief — that educating girls transforms communities, strengthens nations, and shapes the future.
With deep-rooted values and a forward-thinking vision, we have grown into a comprehensive educational institution, offering academic excellence from Nursery to Master’s
level — a true cradle-to-career journey under one roof.
“A society that educates its daughters rewrites its destiny.”

pages.title: Vidyawadi Support System
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)
Its peaceful environment, unpolluted air, sprawling lawns, open air for performing stages and a huge sports ground make Vidyawadi an ideal destination for academics.
A beautiful mix of old and new quarters are inhabited by those who are in service of children.

A well designed, properly lighted, comfortably furnished and well equipped two storeyed 7 hostels to house 660 students. Each hostel has 2 wardens and 2 house maids. A hostel designated for smaller children has two wardens and 5 house maids to look after the young ones.
A state to art kitchen area so to learn cooking meals in hygienic condition. A fully organized dining hall to sear 400 students at a time.

Lunch and dinner comprise of rice, dal, chappatis, a green vegetable and a dry vegetable. Morning breakfast and afternoon snack consists of one dry item and another, a freshly cooked one. Children are served milk and biscuits at night. Items prohibited in 'Jainism', are neither offered nor allowed on the campus. All residents are requested to adhere to these norms.

Overhead and underground water tanks for regular water supply to students and residents. - Solar water heating facility for each hostel and the kitchen - Uninterrupted R.O. drinking facility for all residents.

pages.title: Admission Procedure
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)
Subject to availability of seats and irrespective of any caste and creed we admit girls from Nursery to XI Std.
Girls who are underage or overage beyond reasonable limit may not be considered for admission.
Admission form and prospectus can be collected from school reception.
For any query contact us at 6377203204 / 6377204209 between 10.00 am to 4.00pm.
The school also provides admissions under RIGHT TO EDUCATION to those, belonging to the BPL families, disadvantaged groups, weaker section and the disabled.
The following documents are to be submitted to the school office to seek admission.

pages.title: Academic Curriculum
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)
LPS Vidyawadi is a well known educational institution in Godwad region with the academic curriculum from Pre-primary to Class XII. Here are the details:
Board Affiliation Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School is affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) for classes L.K.G. to XII.

The medium of instruction at Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School is English, and the curricula we follow are in accordance with the CBSE Board. Kindly find the details as follows:

The pre-primary wing of the School comprises of LKG and UKG and caters to the needs of early childhood development. The environment here is child friendly. The classrooms are colorful and located in the Junior Wing where the ultimate focus is on creativity through art-&-craft. The integral part of the curriculum is recognition, reading and writing of Hindi and English letters and words along with basic arithmetical concepts.

At this level children are exposed to formal academics. The young ones are expected to spend more time in activities that enhance their cognitive, emotional, social, physical and motor development. For this group 'Learning by Doing' is the approach.

The school puts equal emphasis on both curricular and co-curricular activities. Curriculum follows CBSE guidelines, and co-curricular activities include socially useful, productive work and Physical and Health Education.

pages.title: Beyond Academics
sections: Auto Extract
Vidyawadi - Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School
Recognized & Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, St. Rani, Distt. Pali (Rajasthan)

In order to enhance the aesthetic skills of the students various creative activities are conducted such as 'Best out of Waste, 'Mehendi Layout, Gift Wrapping, Rangoli Making, Card and Bookmark Making, Paper Cutting and Folding, Face Painting, Collage Making, Drawing and Painting, Poster making etc.
Flower arrangements, acrylic, glass, and fabric paintings, soft toys making and the list is endless. The students are trained under experts, and one can pursue any hobby lifelong.
The ingeniously designed Music room with refined acoustics is a matter of pride for the campus. Both Indian Classical and Folk music are taught here.
Students are trained in all forms of Indian dancing, Aerobics exercises also form part of the fitness programme and doubles up for entertainment as well.

To help students to excel in personal and professional skills through co-curricular activities, the total student strength of the school is divided into four houses; Rani Lakshmi Bai House, Padmavati House, Sarojini Naidu House, Vijaya Lakshmi House. (L.P.S.V.) Inter house competition teach them tolerance and team work, aesthetics and creativity, reading and writing besides getting improved on various sports and indoor games. Each house has a teacher mentor, a student captain and a vice-captain.

The school has large playing fields and our students have the opportunity to play a range of sports — Cricket, Football, Athletics, Hand ball, Badminton, Table tennis and Soft Ball. A modern gym provides additional physical activity. To bring out the child's maximum potential, we have professional coaches for all sports.

We come under Khimel Village Panchayat, located in Pali District, Rajasthan. The campus is on Rani – Falna route, 3kms away from Rani and 11 kms from Falna station.
Delhi – Jaipur – Ajmer – Marwar – Ahmadabad route
